title: actinodaphne perakensis
intro: Actinodaphne perakensis, also known as the Perak actinodaphne, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. Native to Malaysia, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Actinodaphne perakensis include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. It can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
